title: Awesome GPT Image 2
summary: A visual gallery of playful GPT Image use cases, prompts, and experiment patterns. Images are stored in this repository for GitHub Pages publishing.

images.title: a single high-quality 2K landscape concept board showing six playful GPT Image 2 use
images.caption: 历史生成图，批次 019dc238-a73b-7103-9511-255abf22bf76，生成时间 2026-04-25 09:23:26。
images.prompt:
Create a single high-quality 2K landscape concept board showing six playful GPT Image 2 use cases as separate clean panels in one cohesive image. No readable text except tiny abstract UI marks. Style: polished product-design concept art, crisp lighting, colorful but balanced, modern studio quality, realistic objects with subtle illustration polish.

Panel ideas:
1. A messy hand-drawn napkin sketch transforming into a polished visual explainer poster on a desk.
2. A consistent original cartoon explorer character appearing across a four-frame mini comic strip, same outfit and face.
3. A small indie beverage product shown in three ad variants: studio shot, outdoor lifestyle shot, and poster layout.
4. An apartment room evolving into three interior design options with consistent furniture.
5. A wireframe app screen becoming a refined mobile UI mockup.
6. An old travel photo being cleaned up, colorized, and extended into a cinematic memory scene.

Make the six panels feel like a useful research artifact, with clear visual separation, no brand logos, no famous people, no copyrighted characters, no artist-name style imitation.

images.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept

Panel 2: "Continuity Quest" - a character bible sheet for one recurring mascot across pose turnaround, expressions, costume swaps, and prop variants; emphasize consistency.
Panel 3: "Prompt Arcade" - a playful control panel where sliders and buttons generate image variants for product colorway, lighting, texture, and layout; show thumbnails emerging from the machine.
Panel 4: "Edit Relay" - a step-by-step relay race of image edits: sketch -> rendered prop -> packaging -> ad poster -> game card, each step preserving key visual DNA.
Composition: 2x2 grid with thin neutral dividers, coherent across panels but each mechanic distinct.
Style: energetic, maker-lab aesthetic, tactile objects, clean lighting, high-resolution square image, no clutter, no watermark.
